subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou knowest the intensity of my yearning and the magnitude of my attachment to this servant, steadfast in the Covenant and firmly rooted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انک لتعلم شده ولهی و عظیم تعلقی بهذا العبد الثابت علی العهد النابت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
